description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-field

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-field/`
**wc-mcp Health Score:** 88 (B)
**Known issues:** _hasLabelSlot, _hasErrorSlot, _hasHelpSlot, _fieldId, _helpTextId, _errorId — all missing descriptions.

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE FOR SCORING
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report any wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Label, help text, error text colors/spacing. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Label association (for/id). Required indicator. Error association (aria-describedby). Help text association.
3. **Functionality** — Label/help-text/error-text slots. Required indicator. Slot presence detection. ID generation for ARIA associations.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`. Proper ID management.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Layout (label above, beside). Spacing.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Fix all 6 missing descriptions.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Slots. ARIA associations. Required. Error state.
8. **Storybook** — With/without label. Help text. Error. Required.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Form element wrapper. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-field
